message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Package Vod Detail

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ArrowColor #333333
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor transparent
  GroupHeaderBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupHeaderFontStyle bold
}

box "STB" #DDDDDD
participant "PackageVodDetail" as PVD
participant "VodProductManager" as VPM
participant "MBS" as MBS
end box

PVD -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
MBS --> PVD : package vod detail infos

PVD -> VPM : getProductButtons(productList)
VPM --> PVD : product buttons

opt [getting Push for vod purchased]
  MBS -> PVD : purchasePush(offerId)

  PVD -> MBS : get user discount intofs
  MBS --> PVD : discount/cash coupon, membership point

  opt [vod product contains offerId]
    PVD -> MBS : get package vod detail infos
    MBS --> PVD : package vod detail infos

    PVD -> VPM : getProductButtons(productList)
    VPM --> PVD : product buttons
  end
end

@enduml
```
